description: Draft of a legal document (or documents). In Judaeo-Arabic. There is writing on both sides. Looks like the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe, but it is very sloppy, and many lines are crossed out. Involves Abū l-Ḥasan Yosef b. Seʿadya and Yaʿaqov b. [...], and presumably a mercantile dispute, as repeated references are made to "arriving in the land of Egypt" and "goods." In the last line on recto, refers to somebody's brother Rabbenu Yiṣḥaq ha-Rav ha-Muvhaq (also mentioned in DK 237.1 and T-S 10J13.17).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
